title: IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Hyderabad. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Ph.D. in Solid Mechanics/Applied Mathematics/Applied Mechanics/Mechanical Engineering or related fields with prior experience in continuum mechanics. Those who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis are encouraged to apply.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on academic record/achievements Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Research Associate position at IIT Hyderabad is 30th May 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Solid Mechanics, Applied Mathematics, Applied Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, or related fields. Prior experience in continuum mechanics is also a requirement.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit for this position. For precise details, please refer to the official advertisement.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 58,000 per month, plus 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA) if applicable.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate position at IIT Hyderabad through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Hyderabad Research Associate recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the Research Associate position at IIT Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: initial shortlisting based on academic records and achievements, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who have submitted their Ph.D. thesis are explicitly encouraged to apply for this Research Associate position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the direct link to apply online in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to review the notification before applying.
